What I Offer

My Nutrition Services

⚖

Weight Loss

Safe and effective plans to help you lose weight and keep it off.

💪

Muscle Gain

Nutrition strategies to build lean muscle and improve performance.

💧

Diabetes

Medical nutrition therapy to manage blood sugar and improve health.

♀

PCOS & Hormonal Health

Personalized nutrition to balance hormones and improve symptoms.

☘

Gut Health

Improve digestion, reduce inflammation and restore gut balance.

❤

Nutrition support for hypo/hyperthyroidism and metabolic health.

About Me

I am a licensed clinical dietitian with a passion for helping people improve their health through realistic and sustainable nutrition.

My approach is based on science, personalization and long-term results.

Omar Doughan
Before your consultation, please prepare:
📏
Anthropometric Measurements

Height, weight and any recent measurements.

📋
Past Medical History

List of medical conditions, surgeries and medications.

🧪
Recent Analyses

Blood tests and relevant analyses from the last 2 months.
